summary: Full MVP testing of RODDOS Contable IA. 17/17 backend tests passed. All 6 modules load and navigate correctly. Found and fixed 1 critical bug: bank-accounts endpoint returning wrong mock data.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED: Bank account dropdown was showing chart of accounts (ACTIVOS, PASIVOS, etc.) instead of actual bank accounts. Root cause: in alegra_service.py _mock(), 'accounts' check matched before 'bank-accounts' check. Fixed by making the accounts check more specific.

issues: 'Demo Contador' button does NOT have data-testid='demo-contador-btn' - found as 'Contador' button without matching testid. Minor issue, both buttons work visually.

critical_code_review_comments: alegra_service.py _mock() line 71: string matching 'accounts' in endpoint catches 'bank-accounts' too - FIXED in this iteration
Conciliación Bancaria page uses browser native date picker - date input uses type='date' which shows native browser picker, not shadcn calendar

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all modules load, navigation works, AI chat opens, login/logout functional, demo buttons work, KPI cards visible, invoice/bill tables showing mock data)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - demo mode mock data used
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is working well. Fixed bank-accounts mock data bug in alegra_service.py. All 6 modules navigate correctly. AI Chat button testid is 'chat-toggle-btn'. Logout button testid is 'logout-btn'. Demo mode badge shows in header as 'Modo Demo'. Alegra API is MOCKED in demo mode.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: In alegra_service.py _mock() method, string check `if 'accounts' in endpoint` matched both '/accounts' and '/bank-accounts' endpoints (since 'accounts' is a substring of 'bank-accounts'). Fix: Changed to exact match `if endpoint == 'accounts' or (endpoint.startswith('accounts') and 'bank' not in endpoint)`. This ensures bank-accounts endpoint returns MOCK_BANK_ACCOUNTS correctly.
